title: 广州6大品牌奶茶店消费价格分析
text:
1 数据和变量
数据来源：大众点评网，广州六大品牌奶茶店
样本容量：336
数据来源：大众点评网，广州6大奶茶品牌
零售价格: retail.price
团购价格：group.price
品牌： brand
区位：area
市区：荔湾，越秀，天河，海珠
近郊：白云，番禺，黄埔
远郊：花都，从化，南沙，增城

title: 广州6大品牌奶茶店消费价格分析
text:
2 图形工具
2.1 帕累托图
2.2 分组条形图
2.3 分组直方图
2.4 分组箱线图
2.5 散点图

title: 广州6大品牌奶茶店消费价格分析
text:
2.1 帕累托图

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
data  <- read_excel("data/top6.xlsx")

library(forcats)
data %>% ggplot(aes(fct_infreq(brand), fill = brand)) + 
  geom_bar() +
  geom_text(stat = "count", aes(label = after_stat(count)), vjust = -0.5)+ 
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,100))+
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  labs(x = "品牌", fill = "品牌") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 10))

title: 广州6大品牌奶茶店消费价格分析
text:
2.2 分组条形图

data %>%
  group_by(area, brand) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>% 
  mutate(brand_order = paste(brand, area, rank(-count), sep = "_"))  %>% 
  ggplot(aes(reorder(brand_order, -count),
             count, fill = brand)) +
  geom_col()+
  facet_wrap(~ area, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +
  geom_text(aes(label = count), vjust = -0.5) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) gsub("_.+$", "", x)) + # 移除排序编号
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 42)) +
  labs(x = "品牌", y = "数量") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 42, hjust = 1), 
        legend.position = "none")

title: 广州6大品牌奶茶店消费价格分析
text:
2.3 分组直方图

#按单个定性变量分组
data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(retail.price, fill = brand))+
  geom_histogram(breaks = seq(6, 38, 2))+
  facet_wrap(~brand, ncol = 2) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,60))+
  scale_fill_brewer(palette  = "Set1") +
  labs(title = "零售价直方图",
       x = "零售价",
       y = "频数") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(6, 36, 4),
                     labels = seq(6, 36, 4)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 10))


零售价格：喜茶>茶百道>TANNING>CoCo都可>书亦烧仙草>益禾堂

title: 广州6大品牌奶茶店消费价格分析
text:
2.4 分组箱线图

data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(retail.price, reorder(brand, retail.price, FUN = median),
             col = brand))+
  geom_boxplot()+
  labs(title ="六大奶茶品牌零售价格",
       x = "零售价格",
       y = "品牌", fill = "品牌")+
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 10))


零售价格：喜茶>茶百道>TANNING>CoCo都可>书亦烧仙草>益禾堂

title: 广州6大品牌奶茶店消费价格分析
text:
2.5 散点图

data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(retail.price, groupbuy.price,col = brand))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_jitter()+
  geom_smooth(method = lm, se = F) +
  labs(title = "零售价格与团购价散点图",
       x = "零售价",
       y = "团购价") +
  theme_bw() +
    theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 10))


无论在市区、近郊、远郊，同一品牌的团购价格相同。

title: 广州6大品牌奶茶店消费价格分析
text:
3.1 全样本

library(psych)

data %>% 
  select(retail.price, groupbuy.price, comment.num) %>%
  describe() %>% 
  select(n, mean, sd, median, min, max, skew, kurtosis)

                 n   mean      sd median min   max skew kurtosis
retail.price   336  15.60    5.26   15.0   7    35 1.53     1.72
groupbuy.price 301  10.85    4.00   10.5   6    18 0.22    -1.15
comment.num    336 564.28 1027.57  281.0  13 10598 5.24    36.47

title: 广州6大品牌奶茶店消费价格分析
text:
表格中添加分布图像
{gtExtras}

retail_group <- data %>% 
  select(brand, retail.price) %>%
  group_by(brand) %>%
  summarize(mean = mean(retail.price) %>% round(3),
            median = median(retail.price)%>% round(3),
            sd = sd(retail.price)%>% round(3),
            retail_t = list(retail.price))


retail_group %>%
  arrange(desc(mean)) %>% 
  gt() %>% 
  gt_plt_dist(retail_t,
              type = "histogram",
              line_color = "purple",
              fill_color = "green",
              bw = 1)

title: 广州6大品牌奶茶店消费价格分析
text:
3.2 分品牌零售价格比较

data %>%
  group_by(brand) %>%
  summarize(n(),
            min = min(retail.price),
            q1 = quantile(retail.price, 0.25),
            median = median(retail.price),
            mean = mean(retail.price),
            q3 = quantile(retail.price, 0.75),
            max = max(retail.price),
            sd = sd(retail.price)) %>% 
  arrange(desc(median))

# A tibble: 6 × 9
  brand            `n()`   min    q1 median  mean    q3   max    sd
  <chr>            <int> <dbl> <dbl>  <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>
1 喜茶                43    24  27       28  27.9  29      35  1.82
2 茶百道              58    13  15       16  15.6  16      19  1.15
3 TANING手挞柠檬茶    44    13  14.8     15  15.0  16      18  1.07
4 CoCo都可            64    11  13       14  14.4  15      23  2.01
5 书亦烧仙草          82    10  12       13  13.4  14.8    21  1.77
6 益禾堂              45     7   9       10  10.1  11      13  1.29


零售价格：喜茶>茶百道>TANNING>CoCo都可>书亦烧仙草>益禾堂

title: 广州6大品牌奶茶店消费价格分析
text:
3.3 分区域零售价格比较

library(psych)

data %>%
  group_by(area) %>%
  summarize(n(),
            min = min(retail.price),
            q1 = quantile(retail.price, 0.25),
            median = median(retail.price),
            mean = mean(retail.price),
            q3 = quantile(retail.price, 0.75),
            max = max(retail.price),
            sd = sd(retail.price))%>% 
  arrange(desc(median))

# A tibble: 3 × 9
  area  `n()`   min    q1 median  mean    q3   max    sd
  <chr> <int> <dbl> <dbl>  <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>
1 市区    168     8    13     15  16.5  16.2    35  5.90
2 近郊    138     7    13     14  14.7  16      30  4.20
3 远郊     30     8    11     14  14.5  16      28  5.06


零售价格：市区>近郊>远郊

title: 汽车性能分析
text:
1 数据和变量
数据来源：mpg {ggplot2}
样本容量：234
cty: city miles per gallon
hwy: highway miles per gallon

英里每加仑，数值越大，代表越省油。

trans: type of transmission
drv: the type of drive train,

f = front-wheel drive,
r = rear wheel drive,
4 = 4wd

title: 汽车性能分析
text:
2 油耗性能分析
2.1 cty均值的检验
2.2 hwy均值的检验
2.3 四驱和前驱城市油耗比较
2.4 四驱和前驱高速油耗比较
2.5 自动档和手动挡城市油耗比较
2.5 自动档和手动挡高速油耗比较

title: 汽车性能分析
text:
2.1 cty均值的检验

gghistostats(mpg, cty, 
             test.value = 16,
             bin.args = list(color = "black",
                             fill = "cyan")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15)

title: 汽车性能分析
text:
2.1 cty均值的检验
\(H_0: \mu \leq 16\)
\(H_1: \mu > 16\)
拒绝原假设\(H_0: \mu \leq 16\) 。
在城市, 油耗均值大于16英里/加仑。

title: 汽车性能分析
text:
2.2 hwy均值的检验

gghistostats(mpg, hwy, 
             test.value = 22,
             bin.args = list(color = "grey",
                             fill = "purple"),
             centrality.line.args = list(color = "red", 
                                         linewidth = 1, 
                                         linetype = "dashed")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15)

title: 汽车性能分析
text:
2.2 hwy均值的检验
\(H_0: \mu \leq 22\)
\(H_1: \mu > 22\)
拒绝原假设\(H_0: \mu \leq 22\) 。
在高速, 油耗均值大于22英里/加仑。

objectID: case2pre.html#四驱和前驱城市道路油耗比较
href: case2pre.html#四驱和前驱城市道路油耗比较
title: 汽车性能分析
section: 2.3 四驱和前驱城市道路油耗比较
text:
2.3 四驱和前驱城市道路油耗比较

mpg %>%
  filter(drv %in% c("4", "f")) %>%
  ggbetweenstats(drv, 
                 cty,
                 p.adjust.method = "none",
                 xlab = "drive",
                 package = "RColorBrewer",
                 palette = "Set1",
                 violin.args = list(width = 0)
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15)

objectID: case2pre.html#四驱和前驱城市道路油耗比较-1
href: case2pre.html#四驱和前驱城市道路油耗比较-1
title: 汽车性能分析
section: 2.3 四驱和前驱城市道路油耗比较
text:
2.3 四驱和前驱城市道路油耗比较
\(H_0: \mu_4 \geq \mu_f\)
\(H_1: \mu_4 < \mu_f\)
在城市, \(\mu_4 < \mu_f\), 前驱(20)比四驱(14)省油。

objectID: case2pre.html#四驱和前驱高速油耗比较
href: case2pre.html#四驱和前驱高速油耗比较
title: 汽车性能分析
section: 2.4 四驱和前驱高速油耗比较
text:
2.4 四驱和前驱高速油耗比较

mpg %>%
  filter(drv %in% c("4", "f")) %>%
  ggbetweenstats(drv, 
                 hwy,
                 p.adjust.method = "none",
                 xlab = "drive",
                 package = "RColorBrewer",
                 palette = "Set1",
                 violin.args = list(width = 0)
                 ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15)

objectID: case2pre.html#四驱和前驱高速油耗比较-1
href: case2pre.html#四驱和前驱高速油耗比较-1
title: 汽车性能分析
section: 2.4 四驱和前驱高速油耗比较
text:
2.4 四驱和前驱高速油耗比较
\(H_0: \mu_4 \geq \mu_f\)
\(H_1: \mu_4 < \mu_f\)
拒绝原假设\(H_0: \mu_4 \geq \mu_f\)。
在高速, \(\mu_4 < \mu_f\), 前驱(28)比四驱(24)省油。

objectID: case2pre.html#自动档和手动挡城市道路油耗比较
href: case2pre.html#自动档和手动挡城市道路油耗比较
title: 汽车性能分析
section: 2.5 自动档和手动挡城市道路油耗比较
text:
2.5 自动档和手动挡城市道路油耗比较

mpg %>% 
  mutate(transmission = if_else(substr(trans, 1, 4) == "auto", 
                                "automatic", 
                                "manual")) %>% 
  ggbetweenstats(transmission, 
                 cty,
                 p.adjust.method = "none",
                 xlab = "drive",
                 package = "RColorBrewer",
                 palette = "Set1",
                 violin.args = list(width = 0)
                 ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15)

objectID: case2pre.html#自动档和手动挡城市道路油耗比较-1
href: case2pre.html#自动档和手动挡城市道路油耗比较-1
title: 汽车性能分析
section: 2.5 自动档和手动挡城市道路油耗比较
text:
2.5 自动档和手动挡城市道路油耗比较
\(H_0: \mu_{auto} \geq \mu_{manual}\)
\(H_1: \mu_{auto} < \mu_{manual}\)
拒绝原假设\(H_0: \mu_4 \geq \mu_f\)。
在城市, \(\mu_{auto} < \mu_{manual}\) , 手动挡(19)比自动挡(16)省油。

objectID: case2pre.html#自动档和手动挡高速油耗比较
href: case2pre.html#自动档和手动挡高速油耗比较
title: 汽车性能分析
section: 2.6 自动档和手动挡高速油耗比较
text:
2.6 自动档和手动挡高速油耗比较

mpg %>% 
  mutate(transmission = if_else(substr(trans, 1, 4) == "auto", 
                                "automatic", 
                                "manual")) %>% 
  ggbetweenstats(transmission, 
                 hwy,
                 p.adjust.method = "none",
                 xlab = "drive",
                 package = "RColorBrewer",
                 palette = "Set1",
                 violin.args = list(width = 0)
                 ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15)

objectID: case2pre.html#自动档和手动挡高速油耗比较-1
href: case2pre.html#自动档和手动挡高速油耗比较-1
title: 汽车性能分析
section: 2.6 自动档和手动挡高速油耗比较
text:
2.6 自动档和手动挡高速油耗比较
\(H_0: \mu_{auto} \geq \mu_{manual}\)
\(H_1: \mu_{auto} < \mu_{manual}\)
拒绝原假设\(H_0: \mu_4 \geq \mu_f\)。
在高速, \(\mu_{auto} < \mu_{manual}\) , 手动挡(26)比自动挡(22)省油。

title: 汽车性能分析
text:
3 驱动类型分布

#计算三种驱动的百分比
round(100*prop.table(table(mpg$drv)))


 4  f  r 
44 45 11 

ggpiestats(mpg,
           drv,
           ratio = c(0.45, 0.45, 0.1),
           package = "RColorBrewer",
           palette = "Set2")+
  theme_bw(base_size = 15)


四驱、前驱、后驱：45%，45%， 10%

objectID: case2pre.html#驱动类型和传动类型的关系分析
href: case2pre.html#驱动类型和传动类型的关系分析
title: 汽车性能分析
section: 4 驱动类型和传动类型的关系分析
text:
4 驱动类型和传动类型的关系分析

mpg %>% 
  mutate(transmission = if_else(substr(trans, 1, 4) == "auto", 
                                "automatic", 
                                "manual")) %>% 
  ggbarstats(drv,
             transmission,
             package = "RColorBrewer",
             palette = "Paired")+
  theme_bw(base_size = 15)


驱动类型和传动类型相互独立。

objectID: case2pre.html#驱动类型和气缸数量的关系分析
href: case2pre.html#驱动类型和气缸数量的关系分析
title: 汽车性能分析
section: 5 驱动类型和气缸数量的关系分析
text:
5 驱动类型和气缸数量的关系分析

ggbarstats(mpg,
           drv,
           cyl,
           package = "RColorBrewer",
           palette = "Paired")+
  theme_bw(base_size = 15)

objectID: case2pre.html#驱动类型和气缸数量的关系分析-1
href: case2pre.html#驱动类型和气缸数量的关系分析-1
title: 汽车性能分析
section: 5 驱动类型和气缸数量的关系分析

title: 汽车性能分析
text:
6 研究结论

油耗(单位：miles per gallon 英里每加仑), 数值越大代表越省油
城市均值 > 16, 高速均值 > 22
城市：四驱(14) < 前驱(20)
高速：四驱(20) < 前驱(29)
城市：自动挡(16) < 手动挡(19)
高速：四驱(22) < 前驱(26 )

title: 汽车性能分析
text:
6 研究结论

高速比城市道路省油
前驱比四驱省油，高速(9)比城市(6)的差距更大。
手动挡比自动档省油，高速(4)比城市(3)的差距更大。

title: 汽车性能分析
text:
6 研究结论

四驱、前驱、后驱：45%，45%， 10%
驱动类型和传动类型相互独立。
驱动类型和气缸数量不独立。

4缸，72%前驱，28%四驱
6缸，54%前驱， 41%四驱，5%后驱
8缸，1%前驱， 69%四驱，30%后驱

讨论课前准备

在Excel中整理好收集的数据，变量名设置为英文（变量名不要含有中文、空格和中划线），将其导入到EViews。
遇到的问题和困难
请带笔记本电脑。

title: 教材
text: 欢迎访问《经济计量学》课程网站！

title: Case 1 based on Chap 3 and Chap 4
text:
library(tidyverse)


library(readxl)
data  <- read_excel("data/top6.xlsx")


#加载fct_infreq包
library(forcats)
data %>% ggplot(aes(fct_infreq(brand))) + 
  geom_bar(col = 6, fill = 6) +
  facet_wrap(~area) +
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  labs(x = "品牌")







data %>% ggplot(aes(fct_infreq(area))) + 
  geom_bar(col = 1, fill = "cyan")+
  facet_wrap(~brand)+
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +
  labs(x = "品牌")

title: Case 1 based on Chap 3 and Chap 4
text:
直方图

普通直方图

data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(retail.price))+
  geom_histogram(col = 1, fill = 5, breaks = seq(2, 38, 2)) +
  labs(title = "零售价直方图",
       x = "团购价格",
       y = "频数") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(2, 38, 2),
                     labels = seq(2, 38, 2)) +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 15)) 







data %>%
  filter(!is.na(groupbuy.price)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(groupbuy.price))+
  geom_histogram(col = 1, fill = 5, breaks = seq(2, 38, 2)) +
  labs(title = "团购价直方图",
       x = "团购价",
       y = "频数") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(2, 38, 2),
                     labels = seq(2, 38, 2)) +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 15)) 










分组直方图

#按单个定性变量分组
data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(retail.price, fill = area))+
  geom_histogram()+
  facet_wrap(~area, ncol = 1) +
  labs(title = "零售价直方图",
       x = "零售价",
       y = "频数") +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 15)) 

`stat_bin()` using `bins = 30`. Pick better value `binwidth`.








data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(retail.price, fill = area))+
  geom_density()+
  facet_wrap(~area, ncol = 1) +
  labs(title = "零售价直方图",
       x = "零售价",
       y = "概率密度") +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 15)) 







data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(retail.price, color = brand, fill = brand))+
  geom_histogram()+
  facet_wrap(~brand, ncol = 1)+
  labs(title = "零售价直方图",
       x = "零售价",
       y = "频数") +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 15)) 

`stat_bin()` using `bins = 30`. Pick better value `binwidth`.








#按两个定性变量分组后的直方图
data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(retail.price, fill = brand))+
  geom_histogram(breaks = seq(2, 38, 2))+
  facet_grid(vars(brand), vars(area)) +
  labs(title = "零售价直方图",
       x = "零售价",
       y = "频数") +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.position = "bottom") 










概率密度曲线

data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(retail.price, color = area))+
  geom_histogram(aes(y = ..density..,
                 fill = area), breaks = seq(2, 38, 1))+
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1)+
  facet_wrap(~area,ncol=1)

Warning: The dot-dot notation (`..density..`) was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
ℹ Please use `after_stat(density)` instead.

title: Case 1 based on Chap 3 and Chap 4
text:
频数折线图

#分组频数折线图
data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(retail.price, col = area))+
  geom_freqpoly(breaks = seq(2, 38, 1))+
  facet_wrap(~area, ncol = 1)

title: Case 1 based on Chap 3 and Chap 4
text:
箱线图

简单箱线图

data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(retail.price))+
  geom_boxplot()







data %>%
  filter(!is.na(groupbuy.price)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(groupbuy.price))+
  geom_boxplot()










分组箱线图

#facet_wrap 切面
#ncol=1 图形排成1列
data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(retail.price,col = area)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~area, ncol=1) +
  labs(title = "零售价格箱线图",
       x = "零售价格",
       y = "频数") +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 15))







data %>% 
  mutate(brand = reorder(brand, retail.price, FUN = median)) %>%  
  ggplot(aes(retail.price, col = brand)) +
  geom_boxplot()+
  facet_wrap(~brand,ncol=1) +
  labs(title = "零售价格箱线图",
       x = "零售价格",
       y = "频数") +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 10))










按数值大小将箱线图排序

#分组箱线图，箱体按价格降序排列
#在aes()中设置X轴映射厂家
#guides(x = guide_axis(n.dodge = 3)) X轴分类标签错位
data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(reorder(brand,-retail.price),
             retail.price,col = brand))+
  geom_boxplot()+
  guides(x = guide_axis(n.dodge = 3))+
  labs(title ="六大奶茶品牌零售价格",
          x = "品牌",Y = "零售价格")

Ignoring unknown labels:
• Y : "零售价格"








data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(retail.price,reorder(brand,-retail.price),
             col = brand))+
  geom_boxplot()+
  labs(title ="六大奶茶品牌零售价格",
       x = "零售价格",Y = "品牌")

Ignoring unknown labels:
• Y : "品牌"








data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(retail.price,reorder(area,-retail.price),
             col = area))+
  geom_boxplot()+
  labs(title ="六大奶茶品牌零售价格",
       x = "零售价格",Y = "区域")

Ignoring unknown labels:
• Y : "区域"

title: Case 1 based on Chap 3 and Chap 4
text:
分组描述统计

#按area分组,报告retail.price的描述性统计量
data %>%
  group_by(area) %>%
  summarize(n(),
            min = min(retail.price),
            q1 = quantile(retail.price, 0.25),
            median = median(retail.price),
            mean = mean(retail.price),
            q3 = quantile(retail.price, 0.75),
            max = max(retail.price),
            sd = sd(retail.price))

# A tibble: 3 × 9
  area  `n()`   min    q1 median  mean    q3   max    sd
  <chr> <int> <dbl> <dbl>  <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>
1 市区    168     8    13     15  16.5  16.2    35  5.90
2 近郊    138     7    13     14  14.7  16      30  4.20
3 远郊     30     8    11     14  14.5  16      28  5.06

#按area分组,报告retail.price的描述性统计量，表格按mean降序排列
district_table <- data %>%
  group_by(district) %>%
  summarize(n(),
            min = min(retail.price),
            q1 = quantile(retail.price, 0.25),
            median = median(retail.price),
            mean = mean(retail.price),
            q3 = quantile(retail.price, 0.75),
            max = max(retail.price),
            sd = sd(retail.price)) %>% arrange(desc(mean))

#按area分组,报告groupbuy.price的描述性统计量，表格按`n()`降序排列
#filter(!is.na(groupbuy.price)) 剔除有缺失值的个案
district_table <- data %>%
  group_by(area) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(groupbuy.price)) %>% 
  summarize(n(),
           retail.mean = mean(retail.price),
           groupbuy.mean = mean(groupbuy.price)) %>% 
           arrange(desc(`n()`))
district_table

#filter(`n()`>20) 选择分店数量多于20家的品牌
#MAC：`` option+tilda
brand_table <- data %>%
  group_by(brand) %>%
  summarize(n(),
            min = min(retail.price),
            q1 = quantile(retail.price, 0.25),
            median = median(retail.price),
            mean = mean(retail.price),
            q3 = quantile(retail.price, 0.75),
            max = max(retail.price),
            sd = sd(retail.price)) %>% filter(
              `n()`>20) %>% arrange(desc(mean))
brand_table

brand_table <- data %>%
  group_by(brand, area) %>%
  summarize(n(),
            min = min(retail.price),
            q1 = quantile(retail.price, 0.25),
            median = median(retail.price),
            mean = mean(retail.price),
            q3 = quantile(retail.price, 0.75),
            max = max(retail.price),
            sd = sd(retail.price)) %>% filter(
              `n()`>10) %>% arrange(desc(mean))

title: Case 1 based on Chap 3 and Chap 4
text:
总体均值的t检验

mean(data$retail.price)

[1] 15.59821

#检验retail.price总体均值是否大于15.5？
#右侧检验，显著性水平为0.01
t.test(data$retail.price,alter = "greater", mu = 15.5, conf.level = 0.01)


    One Sample t-test

data:  data$retail.price
t = 0.34241, df = 335, p-value = 0.3661
alternative hypothesis: true mean is greater than 15.5
1 percent confidence interval:
 16.2687     Inf
sample estimates:
mean of x 
 15.59821 

# p-value为0.001,拒绝原假设。

title: 第1章
text:

title: 小组作业与实验报告
text: 课堂汇报(第15周)

title: 小组作业/实验报告要求
text:
选题要求
运用统计方法分析现实问题。


数据要求

微观层面的截面数据
样本容量大于60
因变量：定量变量
自变量：至少2个定量变量，至少2个定性变量，建议自变量个数超过4个
不要使用其他教材中的例题或习题数据，不要使用虚拟数据



小组作业汇报 (第15周)

每组汇报时间为5-7分钟。
汇报大纲(PPT 20页左右)：

选题背景
数据来源
数据分析
结论
经验分享




演示文稿

15-20页左右
浅色底色, 深色字体, 字号>28
图表美观，清晰可读性强



汇报文稿提交要求

将演示文稿转成PDF格式，将PDF文件提交到QQ群“期末汇报”文件夹中
PDF文件命名格式：小组编号+组长名字+组长班级.pdf

例如：5黄捷欣19国贸1.pdf
小组编号请查看QQ群中的小组发言时间表




发言时长

5-7分钟, 请演练课堂汇报的时长, 突出重点 。
发言时有倒计时软件计时, 时间到请结束发言。

objectID: casetips.html#r读取excel文件时excel中的数值变成了字符串
href: casetips.html#r读取excel文件时excel中的数值变成了字符串
title: 《R语言与统计应用》实验报告常见问题
section: R读取Excel文件时，Excel中的数值变成了字符串
text:
R读取Excel文件时，Excel中的数值变成了字符串

某列中混有非数字字符, 如空格、文字、符号等
Excel 中该列被显式设置为了“文本”格式
如果前几行的数据不具代表性（如缺失、为字符串等），类型推断就可能失误

objectID: casetips.html#数据框中的定量变量以字符串的形式保存
href: casetips.html#数据框中的定量变量以字符串的形式保存
title: 《R语言与统计应用》实验报告常见问题
section: 数据框中的定量变量以字符串的形式保存
text:
数据框中的定量变量以字符串的形式保存

df <- data.frame(
  name = c("Tom", "Jerry", "Mickey", "Donald", "Goofy"),
  height = c("170", "172", "183", "185", "177"),
  weight = c("73", "78", "85", "92", "70")
)

mean(df$height)

Warning in mean.default(df$height): argument is not numeric or logical:
returning NA


[1] NA

# 把height, weight转换为数值型

df <- df %>%
  mutate(across(c(height, weight), as.numeric))

mean(df$height)

[1] 177.4

title: 《R语言与统计应用》实验报告常见问题
text:
帕累托图

条形按降序排列
标注频数

title: 《R语言与统计应用》实验报告常见问题
text:
帕累托图

mpg %>% 
  ggplot(aes(fct_infreq(class))) + 
  geom_bar(col = "cyan", fill = "cyan")+
  labs(title = "Pareto Diagram", x = "Manufacturer") +
    geom_text(stat = "count",
            aes(label = after_stat(count)), 
            vjust = -0.5)+     
  guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45))+
  labs(title = "Pareto Diagram", x = "Manufacturer") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 70))

objectID: casetips.html#饼图-扇区按百分比降序排列
href: casetips.html#饼图-扇区按百分比降序排列
title: 《R语言与统计应用》实验报告常见问题
section: 饼图 – 扇区按百分比降序排列
text:
饼图 – 扇区按百分比降序排列

# 准备数据：按频数降序排列
df <- mpg %>%
  count(class) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  mutate(pct = round(100 * n / sum(n), 0),
         label = paste0(class, "\n", pct, "%"),
         class = factor(class, levels = class) # 按频数降序设置因子顺序
  )

colors <- colorRampPalette(c("lightblue", "blue", "darkblue"))(nrow(df))

# 绘制饼图（极坐标 + 降序排列）
ggplot(df, aes(x = "", y = n, fill = class)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y", direction = -1) +  # 逆时针方向排列
  geom_text(aes(label = label), 
            col = "white",
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 5) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

title: 《R语言与统计应用》实验报告常见问题
text:
合并小类，减少扇区

df <- mpg %>%
  mutate(class = fct_lump_n(class, 5)) %>% 
  count(class) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  mutate(pct = round(100 * n / sum(n), 0),
         label = paste0(class, "\n", pct, "%"),
         class = factor(class, levels = class) # 按频数降序设置因子顺序
  )

colors <- colorRampPalette(c("lightblue", "blue", "darkblue"))(nrow(df))

# 绘制饼图（极坐标 + 降序排列）
ggplot(df, aes(x = "", y = n, fill = class)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y", direction = -1) +  # 逆时针方向排列
  geom_text(aes(label = label), 
            col = "white",
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 5) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

title: 《R语言与统计应用》实验报告常见问题
text:
合并小类，分组箱线图

mpg %>%
  mutate(class = fct_lump_n(class, 5)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(reorder(class,displ),displ,
             col = class))+
  geom_boxplot()+
  guides(x = guide_axis(n.dodge = 3)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

title: 《R语言与统计应用》实验报告常见问题
section: 独立性检验 —— 适用条件
text:
独立性检验 —— 适用条件

chisq.test(mpg$class, mpg$drv)

Warning in chisq.test(mpg$class, mpg$drv): Chi-squared approximation may be
incorrect



    Pearson's Chi-squared test

data:  mpg$class and mpg$drv
X-squared = 221.6, df = 12, p-value < 2.2e-16

objectID: casetips.html#独立性检验-合并小类降低列联表纬度
href: casetips.html#独立性检验-合并小类降低列联表纬度
title: 《R语言与统计应用》实验报告常见问题
section: 独立性检验 —— 合并小类，降低列联表纬度
text:
独立性检验 —— 合并小类，降低列联表纬度

df <- mpg %>% 
  mutate(class = fct_lump_n(class, 3),
         drv = fct_lump_n(drv, 1))

table(df$class, df$drv)

         
           f Other
  compact 35    12
  midsize 38     3
  suv      0    62
  Other   33    51

objectID: casetips.html#独立性检验-查看期望频数
href: casetips.html#独立性检验-查看期望频数
title: 《R语言与统计应用》实验报告常见问题
section: 独立性检验 —— 查看期望频数
text:
独立性检验 —— 查看期望频数

chisq.test(df$class, df$drv)


    Pearson's Chi-squared test

data:  df$class and df$drv
X-squared = 105.86, df = 3, p-value < 2.2e-16

chisq.test(df$class, df$drv)$expected

         df$drv
df$class         f    Other
  compact 21.29060 25.70940
  midsize 18.57265 22.42735
  suv     28.08547 33.91453
  Other   38.05128 45.94872

objectID: casetips.html#计算行列百分比-提炼研究结论
href: casetips.html#计算行列百分比-提炼研究结论
title: 《R语言与统计应用》实验报告常见问题
section: 计算行/列百分比 —— 提炼研究结论
text:
计算行/列百分比 —— 提炼研究结论

#| echo: TRUE

# 计算行的百分比
table(df$class, df$drv) %>% 
  prop.table(margin = 1)%>% 
  round(2)*100 

         
            f Other
  compact  74    26
  midsize  93     7
  suv       0   100
  Other    39    61

# 计算行的百分比
table(df$class, df$drv) %>% 
  prop.table(margin = 2)%>% 
  round(2)*100 

         
           f Other
  compact 33     9
  midsize 36     2
  suv      0    48
  Other   31    40

objectID: casetips.html#单因素方差分析-分类数太多导致有些组别的样本量太小
href: casetips.html#单因素方差分析-分类数太多导致有些组别的样本量太小
title: 《R语言与统计应用》实验报告常见问题
section: 单因素方差分析 – 分类数太多，导致有些组别的样本量太小
text:
单因素方差分析 – 分类数太多，导致有些组别的样本量太小

# 单因素方差分析
ggbetweenstats(
  data = mpg,
  x = class,
  y = displ,
  type = "parametric",        
  palette = "Accent", 
  violin.args = list(width = 0),
  title = "Suv, Midsize, Compact, Subcompact, Other五个组别的排量比较",
  xlab = "Class",
  ylab = "发动机排量",
  bf.message = FALSE,
  digits = 3L
)

objectID: casetips.html#单因素方差分析-合并小类-排序
href: casetips.html#单因素方差分析-合并小类-排序
title: 《R语言与统计应用》实验报告常见问题
section: 单因素方差分析 – 合并小类, 排序
text:
单因素方差分析 – 合并小类, 排序

# 按中位数对 class 重新排序
df <- mpg %>%
  mutate(
    class = fct_lump(class, n = 4),
    class = fct_reorder(class, displ, 
                        .fun = median, .desc = TRUE)
  )

# 单因素方差分析
ggbetweenstats(
  data = df,
  x = class,
  y = displ,
  type = "parametric",        
  palette = "Accent", 
  violin.args = list(width = 0),
  title = "Suv, Midsize, Compact, Subcompact, Other五个组别的排量比较",
  xlab = "Class",
  ylab = "发动机排量",
  bf.message = FALSE,
  digits = 3L
)
